headings: GSC Birchway Commerce City Project No. c20-849 10681 Peoria Parkway, Commerce City, Colorado 80022
text: This Unconditional Waiver and Release of Lien upon Progress Payment waives and releases all claims of every kind that Supplier has or may have in connection with Subcontractor, Contractor, the Project and the Property through the Release Date, and which could be asserted against the Project, the Property, Subcontractor, Contractor, Owner, any lender on the Project and all officers, shareholders, members, managers, directors, agents and employees of any of them. This Unconditional Waiver and Release of Lien Upon Progress Payment covers all claims through the Release Date except for retention..
